## What

Briefly describe the change and why it is needed.

## How

Key implementation notes, if anything is non-obvious.

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] `npx tsc --noEmit` passes
- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] `npm run build` succeeds
- [ ] Checked light and dark theme where UI changed
- [ ] No fabricated or placeholder data
